mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merge_download_token (token, task_id, owner_id, expire_at, used, created_at) VALUES (#{token}, #{taskId}, #{ownerId}, #{expireAt}, #{used}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE merge_download_token SET token = #{token}, task_id = #{taskId}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, used = #{used}, created_at = #{createdAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM merge_download_token WHERE token = #{token} AND task_id = #{taskId} AND owner_id = #{ownerId}
